title: palicourea deviae
intro: Palicourea deviae is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the devia guanina or devia palicourea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Palicourea deviae include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Palicourea deviae can be made into infusions, decoctions, or ointments, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
